issues.sample: 2014 AUDI RS5 WITH 20,000 MILES W. SHUDDERING OF BRAKES.  ON OCT 3. 2015 MY LOCAL MECHANIC TOOK ALL WHEELS OFF AND WE INSPECTED THE BRAKES.  VISUALLY WE SAW NO PROBLEMS, NO SIGNS OF OVERHEATING, OR CONCERNS.  HE SUGGESTED I TAKE IT TO THE DEALER.  ON OCTOBER 9, 2015 I TOOK MY CAR

narrative.headline: What 2014 Audi Rs5 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 5 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Service Brakes (40% of reports).
